title: aconitum altissimum subsp. penninum
intro: Aconitum altissimum subsp. penninum, also known as the monk's hood or wolfsbane, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Aconitum genus, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloids content. The health benefits of Aconitum altissimum subsp. penninum include its potential to reduce pain, inflammation, and fever, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and promote wound healing. Aconitum altissimum subsp. penninum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and ointments, although it is essential to use it under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its toxicity and potential side effects.
